CustomField.description: An optional field intended to capture descriptive data on the applicants' living situation. Tip: Edit this help text with a description of your program's definition of standard plumbing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
An optional field intended to capture descriptive data on the applicants' living situation.
Tip: Edit this help text with a description of your program's definition of standard plumbing.
CustomField.label: Standard Plumbing
